<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state - yellow also can't grow anymore
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Check colored items
items = [n for n in seg if n['color'] in ['Y', 'N', 'O', 'S'] and n['pixels'] > 10]
print("Colored items:")
for s in sorted(items, key=lambda x: x['pixels'], reverse=True):
    print(f"  color={s['color']} pixels={s['pixels']} boundary={s['boundary']}")

# Check purple objects
p_objects = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'p']
print(f"\nPurple 'p' objects: {len(p_objects)}")
for p in p_objects:
    print(f"  pixels={p['pixels']} boundary={p['boundary']}")

# Red dots
reds = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'r']
print(f"\nRed dots: {len(reds)}")
for r in reds:
    print(f"  boundary={r['boundary']}")

# Show the area around the L-shape and items
print("\n=== Full view ===")
for r in range(25, 46):
    line = ascii_lines[r][8:58]
    if any(c in line for c in 'YNO SPrp'):
        print(f"Row {r}: {line}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
